rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 21, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs ADAM WHITE and SAMUEL SEGALL's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice. Deny, failed to sustain burden. Court concurs with opposing party's pleading. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ABITSCH & ABITSCH, LLC VS. DARUKA WANIGATUNGA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 21, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT DARUKA WANIGATUNGA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HELEN LEE VS. RONALD DAVIS II et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 21, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT RONALD DAVIS' MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant, with leave to amend to verify complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WE BUY NOR CAL RE INC. VS. ALBERTO TORRES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 21, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT ARTURO TORRES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to amend date. = (501/REQ)
